The '''Pink Lizard Thunderbolt''' was a more powerful variation on the [[Elshandruu Pica Thundercloud]]. It was named in honor of the [[Reptile/Legends|reptiloid]] inventor who concocted it in [[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica]], who, once having invented it, would drink nothing else.<ref name="GG9" />
